anti-black-hole repeat-failure limit (2 -> change path, 3 -> stop)

soak.note: The soak is LIVE-tracked and self-accumulating from the daily cron (cn_run_log); it does NOT need agent action, only calendar time. T089 clause 1 closes automatically at 14/14.
